inclusionQuotes.text: Meaningful equity at an early stage company Own your own projects from conception to launch The option of getting paid in Bitcoin Work whenever you work best (flexible hours) Flexible vacation - take time off when you need it Work in the heart of San Francisco's SoMA neighborhood (with easy access to the Caltrain) Work on a big idea that is changing the world
inclusionQuotes.heading: Benefits

inclusionQuotes.text: Interested in helping build the future of currency and payments? Do you regularly run though brick walls on your way to success? Are you passionate about digital currency? If so, you've found the right place. We're a community of builders - engineers, designers, and entrepreneurs - who love what we do.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Life At Coinbase

inclusionQuotes.text: We're currently experiencing rapid growth in transaction volume and revenue due to the public exposure to bitcoin. We're a small team that is aggressively looking to grow. Drop us a line!
inclusionQuotes.heading: Growth

inclusionQuotes.text: We think achieving our mission is the highest leverage way to bring about more economic freedom, innovation, efficiency, and equality of opportunity in the world. Each member of our team—every engineer, designer, kitchen team member, lawyer, writer, support coordinator, recruiter, and product manager—plays an important role in helping us achieve our mission.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Our mission

inclusionQuotes.text: We’ve taken a huge challenge and made it into our mission: To create an open financial system for the world. To achieve this, we are building a team of smart, creative, passionate optimists, the kind of people who see opportunity where others see roadblocks. If this sounds like you, check out our open roles .
inclusionQuotes.heading: Working at Coinbase

inclusionQuotes.text: Our values inform our behavior and the choices we make every day. As a result, our culture is a model of the world we’re trying to build: transparent, joyful, curious, and fast-moving. Our values are a large part of why Coinbase is a great place to work, and why we’ve been successful. They are much more than words to us (and we have the emojis to prove it).
inclusionQuotes.heading: Our values

inclusionQuotes.text: Our mission is ambitious and important. We don’t engage in social or political activism that is unrelated to our mission while at work. We seek to make the workplace a refuge from division, so we can stay focused on making progress toward the mission. To attract top talent around the world and embrace decentralization, all full-time employees can work remote. Prefer an office? We also offer except
inclusionQuotes.heading: Welcome to Coinbase.

inclusionQuotes.text: Outlining our culture helps everyone — from candidates to new leaders to veteran employees — understand how we interact and get work done in service of our mission. Read about the ten culture tenets that define working at Coinbase. If you have an extraordinary ability that can help accelerate our mission, we want to hear from you.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Learn more about working at Coinbase.

inclusionQuotes.text: You will be pushed beyond what you think you're capable of. You will be surrounded by others who excel in their disciplines and expect the same from you. But for those who embrace the challenge, it can be the most impactful work of your career.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Working at Coinbase isn't for the faint of heart.

inclusionQuotes.heading: Apolitical

inclusionQuotes.text: We have high expectations for performance and delivering results, and thrive as a team of individual star performers. Outperformance is met with outsized reward. Unremarkable performance gets a generous severance package.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Championship team

inclusionQuotes.text: Our cultural tenets describe how we treat each other and operate day-to-day, so everyone understands how we interact and get work done in service of our mission.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Welcome to Coinbase

inclusionQuotes.text: Our culture tenets define how we interact and get work done in service of our mission.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Coinbase culture

inclusionQuotes.text: Most roles are remote-first, with in-office requirements noted when applicable. As a remote employee, you'll be asked to join periodic in-person events. We believe flexibility boosts productivity, while in-person collaboration drives innovation.
inclusionQuotes.heading: Remote-first, not remote-only

meritocracyQuotes.text: We have high expectations for performance and delivering results, and thrive as a team of individual star performers. Outperformance is met with outsized reward. Unremarkable performance gets a generous severance package.
meritocracyQuotes.heading: Championship team

meritocracyQuotes.text: Our mission is ambitious and important. We don’t engage in social or political activism that is unrelated to our mission while at work. We seek to make the workplace a refuge from division, so we can stay focused on making progress toward the mission.
meritocracyQuotes.heading: Apolitical

meritocracyQuotes.text: You will be pushed beyond what you think you're capable of. You will be surrounded by others who excel in their disciplines and expect the same from you. But for those who embrace the challenge, it can be the most impactful work of your career.
meritocracyQuotes.heading: Working at Coinbase isn't for the faint of heart.

meritocracyQuotes.text: Our cultural tenets describe how we treat each other and operate day-to-day, so everyone understands how we interact and get work done in service of our mission.
meritocracyQuotes.heading: Welcome to Coinbase

meritocracyQuotes.text: Our culture tenets define how we interact and get work done in service of our mission.

high_scoring_sentences.text: We're a small team that is aggressively looking to grow.
We're a small team that is agressively looking to grow.
We're a community of builders - engineers, designers, and entrepreneurs - who love what we do.

Meaningful equity at an early stage company Own your own projects from conception to launch The option of getting paid in Bitcoin Work whenever you work best (flexible hours) Flexible vacation - take time off when you need it Work in the heart of San Francisco's SoMA neighborhood (with easy access to the Caltrain) Work on a big idea that is changing the world
Interested in helping build the future of currency and payments?
We're a community of builders - engineers, designers, and entrepreneurs - who love what we do.

We had an incredible 2013, growing 80x in users to over 800,000, closed a Series A and Series B, totalling $31M from investors such as Andreessen Horowitz and Union Square Ventures, doing all this with a team of only 8 people.

We're a community of builders - engineers, designers, and entrepreneurs - who love what we do.

Each member of our team—every engineer, designer, kitchen team member, lawyer, writer, support coordinator, recruiter, and product manager—plays an important role in helping us achieve our mission.
To achieve this, we are building a team of smart, creative, passionate optimists, the kind of people who see opportunity where others see roadblocks.
Our values are a large part of why Coinbase is a great place to work, and why we’ve been successful.
As a result, our culture is a model of the world we’re trying to build: transparent, joyful, curious, and fast-moving.
Os nossos valores são uma grande parte do motivo pelo qual a Coinbase é um ótimo lugar para trabalhar e por que somos bem-sucedidos.
If this sounds like you, check out our open roles .
We think achieving our mission is the highest leverage way to bring about more economic freedom, innovation, efficiency, and equality of opportunity in the world.

Cada membro de nossa equipa — todos os engenheiros, projetistas, membros da equipa de cozinha, advogados, escritores, coordenadores de assistência, recrutadores e gestores de produtos — desempenha um papel importante para nos ajudar a alcançar nossa missão.
Para conseguir isto, estamos a criar uma equipa de otimistas inteligentes, criativos e apaixonados, o tipo de pessoas que veem oportunidades onde outros veem obstáculos.
Our values inform our behavior and the choices we make every day.
Achamos que alcançar a nossa missão é a melhor forma para proporcionar mais liberdade económica, inovação, eficiência e igualdade de oportunidades no mundo.
We’ve taken a huge challenge and made it into our mission: To create an open financial system for the world.
Como resultado, a nossa cultura é um modelo do mundo que estamos a tentar criar: transparente, alegre, curioso e rápido.
Each member of our team—every engineer, designer, kitchen team member, lawyer, writer, support coordinator, recruiter, and product manager—plays an important role in helping us achieve our mission.

Our values are a large part of why Coinbase is a great place to work, and why we’ve been successful.
As a result, our culture is a model of the world we’re trying to build: transparent, joyful, curious, and fast-moving.
If this sounds like you, check out our open roles .
We think achieving our mission is the highest leverage way to bring about more economic freedom, innovation, efficiency, and equality of opportunity in the world.

ค่านิยมของเราบ่งบอกถึงพฤติกรรมของเราและการตัดสินใจที่เราเลือกในแต่ละวัน ดังนั้น วัฒนธรรมของเราคือรูปแบบของโลกที่เราพยายามสร้าง นั่นคือ มีความโปร่งใส สนุก น่าค้นหา และก้าวหน้าอย่างรวดเร็ว มูลค่าของเรา เป็นส่วนหนึ่งที่สำคัญว่าเหตุใด Coinbase จึงเป็นสถานที่ที่เหมาะอย่างยิ่งสำหรับการทำงาน และทำไมเราจึงประสบความสำเร็จ สำหรับเราแล้ว ค่านิยมเป็นมากกว่าคำพูด (และพิสูจน์ได้จากอีโมจิของเรา)
Our values inform our behavior and the choices we make every day.

เราคิดว่าการบรรลุ ภารกิจของเรา คือวิธีใช้ประโยชน์ระดับสูงสุดในการนำมาซึ่งอิสรภาพทางเศรษฐกิจ นวัตกรรม ความมีประสิทธิภาพ และความเสมอภาคทางโอกาสที่มากยิ่งขึ้นในโลกใบนี้ สมาชิกของทีมเราแต่ละคน ไม่ว่าจะเป็นวิศวกร นักออกแบบ สมาชิกในทีมครัว นักกฎหมาย นักเขียน ผู้ประสานงานฝ่ายสนับสนุน ผู้สรรหาพนักงาน และผู้จัดการผลิตภัณฑ์ ทุกคนต่างมีบทบาทสำคัญในการช่วยเหลือเราให้บรรลุภารกิจนี้
We’ve taken a huge challenge and made it into our mission: To create an open financial system for the world.

เราได้นำความท้าทายที่ยิ่งใหญ่มาเป็นภารกิจของเรา นั่นคือ สร้างระบบการเงินที่เปิดกว้างสำหรับโลกใบนี้ เพื่อให้บรรลุเป้าหมายนี้ เรากำลังสร้างทีมที่ประกอบด้วยคนที่คิดบวก ทุ่มเท มีความคิดสร้างสรรค์ และฉลาด กลุ่มคนประเภทที่จะมองเห็นโอกาสขณะที่คนอื่นๆ มองเห็นอุปสรรค หากคุณเป็นหนึ่งในนั้น ดูตำแหน่งที่เปิดรับ .
